Sport Navigation Menu

Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Stats History & Records Archived Stories Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

23 Tegen Curley

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 190
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Marshfield, Mo.
  • Highschool The New School (Ark.)
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26 (Freshman): Played in five games overall…Retains year of eligibility…Scored 14 points with five rebounds, two assists, and two blocked shots for the season…Scored a season-high eight points at Regis (12/20/25), with two 3-point field goals and a pair of free throws made…Was a perfect 3-of-3 from the field with six points against Manhattan Christian (11/29/25)…Recorded both of his assists in the game at Regis.

The New School (Ark.): Played his final year of high school at the prep academy in Fayetteville, Arkansas.

Marshfield HS: All-state and all-conference selection as a junior, averaging 18 points and 7.4 rebounds per game.
 

Statistics
